title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Pratham Education

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Pratham Education
jsonLd.description:
Join the Pratham Education family as a Teacher in Pune. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
